name: Top Navigation Bar
description: Horizontal nav with search and user menu
details: A horizontal top navigation bar with logo, nav links, search input, notification bell, and user dropdown menu. Good for simpler apps or mobile-first designs.
instructions: Import: import Topbar, { type NavItem } from './components/Topbar'
Define items: const navItems: NavItem[] = [{ id: 'home', label: 'Home', path: '/' }]
Use: <Topbar logo={...} navItems={navItems} activeId={...} onNavigate={...} user={...} />
patterns: NavItem: { id, label, path?, icon?, badge? }
